---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-23"
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
df <- read.csv("D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/all_age_spec_wide.csv")
```


```{r}
df_long <- bind_rows(
  df %>%
    transmute(age = Langa_Weir_Age.range,
              category = "Langa-Weir",
              ir = Langa_Weir_IR..95..CI.),
  
  df %>%
    transmute(age = Hudomiet_Age.range,
              category = "Hudomiet",
              ir = Hudomiet_IR..95..CI.),
  
  df %>%
    transmute(age = Wu_Age.range,
              category = "Wu",
              ir = Wu_IR..95..CI.),
  
  df %>%
    transmute(age = Expert_Age.range,
              category = "Expert",
              ir = Expert_IR..95..CI.)
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age), age != "NA")

df_long <- df_long %>%
  filter(age %in% c("70_75", "75_80", "80_85", "85_90", "90_95", "95_120"))
```


```{r}
df_plot <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    point = as.numeric(str_extract(ir, "^[0-9.]+")),
    low   = as.numeric(str_extract(ir, "(?<=\\()[0-9.]+")),
    high  = as.numeric(str_extract(ir, "(?<=, )[0-9.]+")),
    
    age = recode(age,
                 "70_75" = "[70–75)",
                 "75_80" = "[75–80)",
                 "80_85" = "[80–85)",
                 "85_90" = "[85–90)",
                 "90_95" = "[90–95)",
                 "95_120" = "95+")
  ) %>%
  select(age, category, point, low, high) %>%
  arrange(age, category)

ir <- df_plot %>%
  mutate(
    age = factor(age, levels = c("[70–75)","[75–80)","[80–85)","[85–90)","[90–95)","95+")),
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Langa-Weir","Hudomiet","Expert","Wu"))
  )
```


```{r}
### Date: 2025-11-04 ----
pal4 <- c(
  "Langa-Weir" = "#648FFF",
  "Hudomiet"   = "#DC267F",
  "Expert"     = "#E69F00",
  "Wu"         = "#00A08A"
)

# shapes: diamond=23, square=22, triangle=24, circle=21
shape4 <- c(
  "Langa-Weir" = 23,
  "Hudomiet"   = 22,
  "Expert"     = 24,
  "Wu"         = 21
)

# Match point size to HR figure (larger, poster-friendly)
size4 <- c(
  "Langa-Weir" = 2.0,
  "Hudomiet"   = 2.0,
  "Expert"     = 2.0,
  "Wu"         = 2.0
)

# y-axis range
y_min <- floor(min(ir$low, na.rm = TRUE) / 5) * 5
y_max <- ceiling(max(ir$high, na.rm = TRUE) / 5) * 5

pos <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

p_ir <- ggplot(
  ir,
  aes(
    x     = age,
    y     = point,
    ymin  = low,
    ymax  = high,
    color = category,
    group = category
  )
) +
  # Connecting lines (thicker to match HR error bars)
  geom_line(position = pos, linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.4) +
  
  # CIs (thicker error bars)
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(group = category),
    width    = 0.2,
    size     = 1.4,     # ↑ similar to HR fig
    position = pos
  ) +
  
  # Points: larger, with stroke for better visibility
  geom_point(
    aes(shape = category, fill = category, size = category),
    position = pos,
    stroke   = 1        # outline thickness
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(y_min, y_max),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal4, name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal4, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape4, name = NULL) +
  scale_size_manual(values = size4, guide = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Incidence rate (95% CI)"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 18),
    plot.title        = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 13)
  )

p_ir



```






```{r}
ggsave(
  "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Manuscript/Output/figure2_unweighted_ir_plot.pdf",
  p_ir,
  width  = 10,
  height = 11,
  bg     = "white"
)
```


```{r}
df <- read_csv("D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/all_unweighted_age_spec_by_ethnicity_wide.csv")
```


```{r}
df_long <- bind_rows(
  df %>%
    transmute(
      race = `Langa_Weir_Race and ethnicity`,
      age = `Langa_Weir_Age range`,
      ir = `Langa_Weir_IR (95% CI)`,
      category = "Langa-Weir"
    ),
  
  df %>%
    transmute(
      race = `Hudomiet_Race and ethnicity`,
      age = `Hudomiet_Age range`,
      ir = `Hudomiet_IR (95% CI)`,
      category = "Hudomiet"
    ),
  
  df %>%
    transmute(
      race = `Wu_Race and ethnicity`,
      age = `Wu_Age range`,
      ir = `Wu_IR (95% CI)`,
      category = "Wu"
    ),
  
  df %>%
    transmute(
      race = `Expert_Race and ethnicity`,
      age = `Expert_Age range`,
      ir = `Expert_IR (95% CI)`,
      category = "Expert"
    )
) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(race), race != "NA",
    !is.na(age),  age != "NA",
    !is.na(ir),   ir != "NA"
  ) %>%
  select(age, category, ir, race)

df_long
```


```{r}
df_long <- df_long %>%
  filter(ir != "< 5 events")
```

```{r}
df_long <- df_long %>%
  filter(age %in% c("70_75", "75_80", "80_85", "85_90", "90_95", "95_120"))
```


```{r}
df_plot <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    point = as.numeric(str_extract(ir, "^[0-9.]+")),
    low   = as.numeric(str_extract(ir, "(?<=\\()[0-9.]+")),
    high  = as.numeric(str_extract(ir, "(?<=, )[0-9.]+")),
    
    age = recode(age,
                "70_75" = "[70–75)",
                 "75_80" = "[75–80)",
                 "80_85" = "[80–85)",
                 "85_90" = "[85–90)",
                 "90_95" = "[90–95)",
                 "95_120" = "95+")
  ) %>%
  select(age, category, point, low, high,race) %>%
  arrange(age, category)

ci_ceiling <- 700

ir <- df_plot %>%
  mutate(
    age = factor(age, levels = c("[70–75)","[75–80)","[80–85)","[85–90)","[90–95)","95+")),
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Langa-Weir","Hudomiet","Expert","Wu")),
    race = factor(race, levels = c("NH White", "NH Black", "Hispanic", "NH Other")),
  
    upper_trunc = high > ci_ceiling,
    high_plot = ifelse(high > ci_ceiling, ci_ceiling, high)
  )
```


```{r}
ir <- ir %>%
  filter(race != "NH Other")
```



```{r}
pal4 <- c(
  "Langa-Weir" = "#648FFF",
  "Hudomiet"   = "#DC267F",
  "Expert"     = "#E69F00",
  "Wu"         = "#00A08A"
)

shape4 <- c(
  "Langa-Weir" = 16,
  "Hudomiet"   = 17,
  "Expert"     = 15,
  "Wu"         = 18
)

```



```{r}
pos <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

y_min <- floor(min(ir$low, na.rm = TRUE) / 5) * 5
y_max <- ci_ceiling+ 20

p_ir <- ggplot(
  ir,
  aes(
    x = age,
    y = point,
    ymin = low,
    ymax = high_plot,  
    colour = category,
    shape = category,
    group = category
  )
) +
  geom_line(
    position = pos,
    linewidth = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    position = pos,
    width = 0.20,
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_point(
    position = pos,
    size = 2.8,
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
geom_point(
  data = ir %>% filter(upper_trunc),
  aes(
    x = age,
    y = ci_ceiling
  ),
  shape = 24,
  size = 7,
  stroke = 1.2,
  fill = "#00A08A",     
  colour = "#00A08A",   
  position = pos,
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  show.legend = FALSE
) +

  facet_wrap(~ race, ncol = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(y_min, y_max),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal4, name = NULL) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape4, name = NULL) +
  labs(
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Incidence rate (95% CI)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 32, face = "bold"),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 20),
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_ir

p_ir
```


```{r}
ggsave(
  "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/unweighted_ir_plot_stratified_3_23.png",
  p_ir,
  width  = 22,
  height = 12,
  bg     = "white"
)
```
